sources.snippet: Overview page for Python 3.13 changes and updates.

sources.title: Python 3.13.0 release page
sources.snippet: Python.org release notes confirm Python 3.13 is still the stable supported branch.

https://docs.python.org/3/whatsnew/3.13..title: What's New In Python 3.13
https://docs.python.org/3/whatsnew/3.13..content: Official documentation says Python 3.13 is still the supported stable branch and current release line.
